title: OverrideDefinition
description: User-authored reusable template for therapy overrides (exercise, sleep, illness, etc.)

definitionId.description: Unique identifier for this override definition

description.description: Optional longer description of when to use this override

defaultDuration.description: Default duration in seconds; null means indefinite until manually ended

effects.description: Therapy adjustments when this override is active

low.description: Lower target bound in configured units

high.description: Upper target bound in configured units

targetDelta.description: Relative adjustment to existing target (positive = raise target)

basalMultiplier.description: Multiplier for basal rate (1.0 = no change, 0.5 = 50%, 1.5 = 150%)

maxBasalCeiling.description: Maximum basal rate cap in U/hr

sensitivityMultiplier.description: Multiplier for ISF (>1 = more sensitive, <1 = more resistant)

automationAggressiveness.description: Scaling factor for automation aggressiveness if controller supports

isArchived.description: Soft delete - archived definitions cannot be instantiated
